context: Tests whether the answer builds a current SwiftUI PencilKit canvas with correct PKToolPicker observer and state synchronization behavior.

checklist.name: Representable
checklist.description: Wraps PKCanvasView in UIViewRepresentable and uses a Coordinator as PKCanvasViewDelegate.

checklist.name: Tool Picker Retention
checklist.description: Retains PKToolPicker outside a local function scope, such as on the coordinator or view controller.

checklist.name: Observer Setup
checklist.description: Adds the canvas as a PKToolPicker observer before showing the picker or making the canvas first responder.

checklist.name: Drawing Policy
checklist.description: Chooses or explains .default, .anyInput, and .pencilOnly in a way that supports Pencil-primary and optional finger drawing modes.

checklist.name: Persistence
checklist.description: Saves with PKDrawing.dataRepresentation() and reloads with PKDrawing(data:).

checklist.name: Update Loop Guard
checklist.description: Avoids SwiftUI/UIKit synchronization loops by checking drawing equality before assigning back to the canvas.
